notes: Edge case where the person-SVG figure contained both the real headshot and the cover/background image. Previous logic incorrectly selected the background image (alt='Cover photo' and URL contained 'displaybackgroundimage'). This profile validates the hardening added to strongly reject background/cover images inside the person-SVG figure and across all tiers. The correct headshot uses image hash D5603AQGBCb89XGsSIQ.
